title: Weekly Move Items Automation

posts.author: asher (Nathaniel Kraut)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there currently any way to change a pulse’s status automatically at the same time every week?

For example: can I set it up where every Thursday AM at 9AM the status of a pulse changes from “in progress” to “done”?

Thank you for your help!

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
